utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items by name. Each item also contains the required details: provider, coverage description, and cost breakdown (monthly and annual). The total_budget includes a full cost breakdown and comparison. Therefore, all five required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four providers: PrimeCare / ExecutiveGlobal for health, LifeFirst for property, LifeFirst for travel, and ExecutiveGlobal Platinum for additional services. Referring to the ground-truth ratings, PrimeCare Premium Plan has a rating of 10 for both physical and mental health coverage. LifeFirst Standard Coverage has a rating of 8 under property_protection → home_content. LifeFirst Standard Plan under travel_insurance has a rating of 7. The 'ExecutiveGlobal Platinum' additional service corresponds most closely to 'Premium Insurance Membership' in general_services, which has a rating of 10.
